_comment: POD curves from FAA AC 33.14-1 (2001), Appendix 5, Figures A5-1 to A5-5. The AC publishes these only as graphs; the numbers here were extracted from the vector path geometry of the official PDF anchored to the figure gridlines (estimated accuracy ~0.5% POD, 1-2% in size). They are faithful to the published curves but are a digitization, not an FAA-published table. UT curves are vs anomaly AREA in square mils; FPI and ECI curves are vs anomaly LENGTH in mils.

ut-3fbh-cal.description: Ultrasonic, field components, #3 FBH calibration, reject at calibration response. The calibration test case POD.

ut-3fbh-half.description: Ultrasonic, #3 FBH calibration, reject at one half calibration response.

ut-1fbh-cal.description: Ultrasonic, #1 FBH calibration, reject at calibration response.

ut-2fbh-cal.description: Ultrasonic, #2 FBH calibration, reject at calibration response.

fpi-full-field.description: Fluorescent penetrant, finish-machined surfaces, full-field inspection. Surface LCF cracks, 2:1 length:depth, size is surface length.

eci-cal.description: Eddy current, finish-machined surfaces, reject at calibration notch response.

eci-half.description: Eddy current, reject at one half calibration notch response.
